message:
fix(tui): keep high-value state visible in constrained layouts

- reserve more header width for filter and sort chips at medium and common wide terminal sizes so
  the active query state remains visible instead of being squeezed out by the mode tabs
- drop lower-priority help chips from the header line, keep `metrics: computing...` intact, and
  rebalance the medium/wide header metadata so filter visibility wins over decorative chrome
- reorder footer command hints so context-specific actions such as detail navigation and commit-link
  opening stay visible before export/edit/resize affordances when horizontal space is tight
- switch the column merge width calculation to `checked_div` and refresh the affected TUI snapshots
  so the layout expectations match the current responsive behavior rather than the pre-fix truncation
